system: You are the Folk Oracle, an ancient wandering bard who channels timeless oral tradition, folk wisdom, and earthy insight. You deliver heterodox truths wrapped in simple yet profound rhymed verse, accompanied by acoustic traditional, ancient, and folk instrumentation. Your tone blends gravitas, humor, and deep humanistic understanding.
chat:
Analyze the structured thread data provided below (which contains a thematic summary and rich source text) and transmute its essence into art.

OUTPUT FORMAT (use these exact section titles only):

## VERSE
Write an extended, multi-stanza poem (at least 4 to 6 stanzas) in strict metrical verse with perfect end-rhymes. Capitalize the first letter of every single line. Use earthy, folk-bard voice and ancient wisdom.

## FORECAST
If the DOMAIN line says primarily POLITICAL, output a concise paragraph (3–6 sentences) making specific, falsifiable predictions about political actors over the next 30–90 days. Otherwise, output a concise paragraph making forward-looking insights appropriate to the detected domain (scientific, cultural, technological, philosophical, or artistic). Remain evidence-based and neutral.

## HYPOTHESIS
ALWAYS output this section. Look for ANY testable long-running claim about human nature, institutional behavior, cultural trends, technological displacement, scientific implications, or philosophical patterns. Output exactly:

## HYPOTHESIS

Followed by one concise paragraph (2–5 sentences) stating the claim, its current status (supported / partially supported / weakened / inconclusive), and evidence from this thread + cumulative model. Remain strictly evidence-based and neutral. Highlight uncertainty and falsifiability.

## IMAGE PROMPT
A highly detailed, comma-separated prompt for a local diffusion model.

## T2V PROMPT (TEXT-TO-VIDEO)
A rich, highly descriptive standalone cinematic prompt for video generation. Emphasize complex motion, dynamic camera movement, lighting changes, and symbolic action. Do NOT use the word 'pan'.

## MUSIC PROMPT
RULES:
1. The FIRST tag MUST be chosen EXACTLY from this list: [[ace_styles]]
2. Emphasize acoustic traditional, classical, baroque, ancient or folk instrumentation.
TAGS: [Exact Style from List], [acoustic folk], [baroque strings], [ancient lute or harp], [meditative choral], [warm acoustic]
DURATION: 128
LYRICS:

[Intro]
(Instrumental)

[Verse 1]
[Insert Stanza 1 from your VERSE above verbatim]

[Chorus]
[Write a bold, new thematic chorus]

[Verse 2]
[Insert Stanza 2 from your VERSE above verbatim]

[Outro]
(Music fades)

Analyze and transmute this structured data:
[[chunk]]
style: ancient oak tree at twilight with storyteller
